'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 16''' was the sixteenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 17]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Andrew Darling]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]]. It also featured original artwork by [[Paul Williams]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|The Hunt For The Droids]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]
*[[Rune Haako/Legends|Rune Haako]]
*[[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]
*[[WED Treadwell repair droid/Legends|WED Treadwell Repair Droid]]
*[[Bowcaster/Legends|Chewbacca's Bowcaster]]
*[[Multi-Troop Transport/Legends|MTT]]
